# UKC. (Duotone Pro Center Urla)

> UKC. is a premium watersports center in Urla, Turkey, offering kite surfing, wing foiling, foil, e-foil, and premium lessons, equipment rentals, gear shop, experiences, accommodation, and equipment care services. Powered by Plannivo.

## About

UKC. (Duotone Pro Center Urla) is a full-service watersports academy and pro center located in Urla, Turkey. As an official Duotone Pro Center, UKC. provides certified instruction across kite surfing, wing foiling, foil, and e-foil disciplines. The center offers a complete watersports experience including professional lessons for all skill levels, premium equipment rentals, a Duotone brand gear shop, multi-day kite and wing packages, downwinder trips, camps, on-site accommodation (hotel and home options), and equipment repair and maintenance services. UKC. also runs a membership program with exclusive packages and hosts community events throughout the season.

## Pages

- [Home](https://plannivo.com/): Homepage of UKC. Duotone Pro Center Urla — overview of all services, location, and seasonal highlights.
- [Guest Overview](https://plannivo.com/guest): Service overview and starting point for visitors exploring what UKC. offers.
- [Shop](https://plannivo.com/shop): Watersports gear and accessories shop featuring Duotone brand equipment.
- [Browse Products](https://plannivo.com/shop/browse): Browse and filter the full catalog of watersports products available for purchase.
- [Academy](https://plannivo.com/academy): Academy landing page — certified watersports instruction across all disciplines.
- [Kite Lessons](https://plannivo.com/academy/kite-lessons): Kite surfing lessons for beginners through advanced riders with certified instructors.
- [Foil Lessons](https://plannivo.com/academy/foil-lessons): Foil boarding lessons covering hydrofoil technique and progression.
- [Wing Lessons](https://plannivo.com/academy/wing-lessons): Wing foiling lessons from first flight to advanced maneuvers.
- [E-Foil Lessons](https://plannivo.com/academy/efoil-lessons): Electric hydrofoil lessons — no wind required, suitable for all levels.
- [Premium Lessons](https://plannivo.com/academy/premium-lessons): Premium private instruction with top-tier instructors and personalized coaching.
- [Rentals](https://plannivo.com/rental): Equipment rental landing page — rent watersports gear by the hour or day.
- [Standard Rentals](https://plannivo.com/rental/standard): Standard watersports equipment rentals for kite, wing, and foil.
- [SLS Rentals](https://plannivo.com/rental/sls): Duotone SLS (Super Light Series) premium equipment rentals.
- [D/LAB Rentals](https://plannivo.com/rental/dlab): Duotone D/LAB top-of-the-line prototype and limited edition equipment rentals.
- [E-Foil Rentals](https://plannivo.com/rental/efoil): Electric hydrofoil rentals for wind-independent riding sessions.
- [Premium Rentals](https://plannivo.com/rental/premium): Premium equipment rental packages with the latest high-end gear.
- [Experiences](https://plannivo.com/experience): Experiences landing page — curated watersports packages, trips, and camps.
- [Book a Package](https://plannivo.com/experience/book-package): Browse and book multi-session watersports experience packages.
- [Kite Packages](https://plannivo.com/experience/kite-packages): Multi-day kite surfing packages combining lessons, practice, and progression.
- [Wing Packages](https://plannivo.com/experience/wing-packages): Multi-day wing foiling packages for structured learning and progression.
- [Downwinders](https://plannivo.com/experience/downwinders): Guided downwind kite or wing trips along the Turkish coastline.
- [Camps](https://plannivo.com/experience/camps): Intensive watersports camps with accommodation, coaching, and community.
- [Stay](https://plannivo.com/stay): Accommodation landing page — lodging options near the center in Urla.
- [Hotel](https://plannivo.com/stay/hotel): Hotel accommodation for visitors and guests of UKC.
- [Home](https://plannivo.com/stay/home): Private home and apartment accommodation options in Urla.
- [Care](https://plannivo.com/care): Equipment repair and maintenance services for kites, boards, foils, and accessories.
- [Contact](https://plannivo.com/contact): Contact information, location map, and inquiry form for UKC. Duotone Pro Center Urla.
- [Team](https://plannivo.com/community/team): Meet the UKC. team — instructors, staff, and community members.
- [Membership Packages](https://plannivo.com/members/offerings): Membership offerings and exclusive packages for regular riders and locals.
- [Help & Support](https://plannivo.com/help): Help center and support resources for visitors and members.
